subcodes.title: Words to Aline Shane-Devin spoken on 1907-10-14
subcodes.first_line: It is as difficult for the human mind to understand the Essence of God as for the watch to understand its maker... The only test of its truth lies in the influence this conception has upon our lives
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as mediator, @bringing forth results; fruit, @knowledge; recognition of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @love and unity, @love of God, @goodly deeds; actions
